name: Suspicious Privileged Admin Activity
description: Investigate and contain suspicious use of admin privileges — covers impossible travel, after-hours admin actions, privilege escalation signals, and insider threat indicators.

steps.name: Pull full admin activity log for the account
steps.description: Extract all privileged actions taken by the account in the last 30 days. Focus on: role assignments, user creation/deletion, policy changes, and data exports.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would query Entra ID audit log for all admin operations by the suspect account. Export to evidence.

steps.name: Verify impossible travel or session anomaly
steps.description: Cross-reference sign-in logs with the reported impossible travel alert. Confirm geolocation delta, device ID, IP, and ASN. Rule out VPN or travel.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would pull sign-in logs and map IP geolocation timeline. Calculate travel speed between auth events.

steps.name: Suspend the admin account pending investigation
steps.description: Temporarily disable the admin account. Do not delete. Coordinate with their manager before suspending to avoid disruption to legitimate work.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would set accountEnabled: false on the admin account via Entra ID. Login blocked immediately.

steps.name: Audit all changes made during suspicious window
steps.description: Review every action taken during the suspicious period: new accounts created, role assignments, MFA policy changes, conditional access bypasses, and external sharing.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would search unified audit log for all change events attributed to this admin during the anomaly window.

steps.name: Reverse unauthorized changes
steps.description: For each unauthorized change identified: remove accounts created, revoke role assignments added, restore modified policies. Each reversal requires individual verification.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would generate reversal script for all unauthorized changes. Script reviewed before execution.

rollback.note: Changes logged before reversal for recovery.

steps.name: Review and tighten PIM / JIT admin access
steps.description: Recommend converting standing admin roles to Privileged Identity Management (PIM) just-in-time access if not already in place.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would audit current standing Global Admin role assignments and identify candidates for PIM conversion.

evidence_checklist: List of all changes made during anomaly window
